title: HR & Payroll
metaTitle: HR & Payroll Software · Run Payroll Easily · Paper & Pen
metaDescription: Manage employees, attendance, leave and payslips in one place. Run payroll in any currency, post salaries to your books, end-of-service ready. Works worldwide.
keywords: hr software, payroll software, payslips, attendance, leave management, end of service, wps, employee management
heroTitle: Pay your team right, every time
heroSubtitle: Employees, attendance, leave and payroll in one tidy module. Run a payroll cycle, generate payslips and post salaries to your accounts in minutes, not days.

features.title: Employee records
features.desc: One profile per person: contract, salary, documents and history.

features.title: Attendance & overtime
features.desc: Capture shifts, overtime and absences that flow into payroll.

features.title: Leave management
features.desc: Set leave policies, approve requests and track balances automatically.

features.title: Payslips
features.desc: Generate clear, itemised payslips and share them with each employee.

features.title: Deductions & EOS
features.desc: Handle loans, deductions and end-of-service calculations correctly.

features.title: Posts to books
features.desc: Each payroll run posts salaries and accruals to your accounts automatically.

sections.title: From attendance to payslip without spreadsheets
sections.body: Attendance, overtime, leave and loans all feed the payroll run, so you stop stitching together spreadsheets at month end. Approve the cycle once and Paper & Pen produces every payslip and the salary journal in one go.

sections.title: Payroll that fits your country and currency
sections.body: Pay staff in any currency and configure the allowances, deductions and end-of-service rules that apply where you operate. With Arabic, English, Hindi, Bengali and Urdu interfaces, your team can read their own payslips and request leave in their own language.

faqs.a: It's an optional paid add-on. The free-forever core covers Sales & Invoicing, and you add HR & Payroll when you need to manage staff and salaries.

faqs.q: Can I run payroll in any currency?
faqs.a: Yes. Pay your team in OMR, AED, SAR, USD, EUR or any currency, with allowances and deductions configured per your rules.

faqs.q: Does it handle attendance and leave?
faqs.a: Yes. Capture attendance and overtime, set leave policies, approve requests and track balances, all feeding payroll.
Yes. Each run posts salaries, allowances and accruals to your ledger automatically when Accounting is enabled.
Yes. Configure end-of-service and gratuity rules for your country so final settlements are calculated correctly.

ctaSub: Start free with invoicing and add HR & Payroll to manage your team and run payroll in minutes.
